titleStmt.title: SII 15.32: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 32. (B.K. No. 96 of 1929-30.) MUTTAGI, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the wall (left side) of the Saṁgamēśvara temple.
This is dated the 10th regnal year of the king, Prabhava, Chaitra, ba. 5. Monday, Vishu-saṁkrānti (wrong for Mēsha-saṁkrānti), corresponding to 1147 A.D., March 24.

It registers the grant of the village Nāgavāḍa in Hebbāḷu Twelve, a kaṁpaṇa of Tarddavāḍi Thousand, made by the king, at the request of Mahāsāmantādhipati, Mahāpradhāna, Haḍapad-adhishṭhāyaka, Manevergaḍe, Sēnādhipati Bammaṇayya to the temple of Śivaliṅgadēva at the agrahāra of Muttage, situated in Muttage Thirty, a subdivision of Tarddavāḍi Thousand. The temple is stated to have been constructed by Śivarāja-chamūpa who also built another temple at Vijayāpura (modern Bijapur) called Jagadēkapura. The gift is stated to have been made with the consent of Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara Kumāra Bijjaḷadēva, apparently of the Kalachuri family, thus showing that he was already holding a responsible position. The religious establishment was placed in charge of Lakuḷīśvara who belonged to a line of Śaiva teachers hailing from Kāśmīra, that had settled at Vijayāpura. The genealogy of the Chālukyas from Tailapa down to Jagadēkamalla is given. A gift of one pon derived from Baṇṇige tax is stated to have been made annually to the same temple by Herggaḍe Bammarasa, an officer of Daṇḍanāyaka Maiḷāra who is described as the amātya of Bijjaḷa-nṛipa and governing Tarddavāḍi-nāḍu. This is followed by some more gifts.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraśtuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . Ōṁ namaśśivāya
śrīkaṁṭhanityarūpaṁ nirupamamahimaṁ viśvalōkādhināthaṁ śrī kāṁtāṁbhōjajanma pramukhasa�ragaṇastū
yamānaṁ mahēśaṁ lōkālōkaikabījaṁ paśupatiśivaliṁgaṁ jitānaṁganī bhūlōkakke llaṁdadiṁdaṁ śubha
mananudinaṁ māḍugācaṁdratāraṁ . śrīkāṁtākāṁtanātmōdarabhavanadoḷūṁda¨rkkaṟiṁ baytupaytaṁ lōkālōkaṁgaḷaṁ kāvanu
pamamahimaṁ viśvalōkaikavajra prākāraṁ viśvarūpaṁ jitadanujakuḷaṁ pāḷitāśēṣa nākānīkaṁ pāḷikke dhātrīvaḷayamana
khiḷādhāranācaṁdratāraṁ . śrīmatraibhuvanaikanētrenakhiḷapradyōtitajyōti riksāmātha¨rbba yaju¨rmmayaṁ hariviriṁcēśānarū
paṁ prabhōddāvaṁ viśvajagakkameyde śivaliṁgāsthānasaṁsthaṁ tamastōmadhvaṁsakaraṁ karaṁ beḷagu�¨rkkuṁ caṁdratārānvitaṁ . śrīcāḷukyakuḷābja .
muḷḷalaralatyutsāhadiṁ viśvadhātrīcakrakkanurāgamāgaludayaṁgeydaṁ caḷukyānvaya prācīnācaḷadoḷnarēṁdra
nutanudyanmaṁḍaḷāgrōllasadrōciprasphuritapracaṁḍakaranu¨rbbīpāḷapaṁ taiḷapaṁ . Ene nagaḷda tailapadēvana tanayaṁ śau¨ryyaśāḷi sa
tyāśrayadēvanata¨rkkyavikramaṁ bhūvanitēśaṁ rājarājananupamatējaṁ . Atuḷabaḷarādarā bhūpatige suta¨rvvikramāṁkana
yyaṇadēvaṁ pratipakṣanṛpanṛsiṁhapratimaṁ jayasiṁhaneṁbaru¨rbbigadhīśaraṁ . śrī jayasiṁha narēṁdratanūjaṁ trailōkyamalla
nāhavamallaṁ tējōnidhi tatsutanadhirājaṁ bhuṣanaikamalladēvaṁ naga¨rddaṁ . vinutaṁ tadbhū vallabhananujātaṁ viṣṇuva¨rddhanaṁ śrīma
ttribhuvanamalladēvanā nṛpatanayaṁ bhūlōkamalladēvanarēṁdraṁ . Agaṇitavikrama nātana maganuddhatavairivaṁśavanadavadaha
naṁ jagadēkamalladēvaṁ negaḷdi¨rddaṁ ripunṟipāḷamastakaśūḷaṁ . Ā naranāthana maneyoḷu tānasadaṁ ba¨rṁmmadēvadaṁḍādhīśaṁ śrīnātha
na maneyoḷu vinetānandananesavavolu sāhasatuṁgaṁ . ba¨rṁmmaṇadaṁḍanāthana mahōṁna tiyaṁ dhṛtiyaṁ caritramaṁ pe¨rmmeyanīga
ḷeyde paribhāvisi nōḷpaḍe mēlenippanā dha¨rmmatanūbhavaṁgenuta baṇnipudī jagamella moldu takkū¨rmmeyinandoḍe vogaḷvaniṁ po
gaḷvaṁ budhakalpavṛkṣanaṁ . Atuḷabaḷaṁ pratāpanidhi tāṁ padepiṁ jagadēkamallabhūpati besasalke hoysaḷananā¨rddeṟeya
ṭṭi taguḷdu tūḷdu mārutiyavoloṁde dīṁkinoḷavaṁ biṟutaṁbudhivāydaneṁdoḍuddha tikeyināṁparā¨rddhuradoḷī
kali ba¨rṁmmaṇadaṁḍanāthanaṁ . © Ene nega¨rdda puṇyapuṁjana maneyoḷu śubhacaritanenipa mādhavadēvaṁ trinayanana pore
yoḷabjāsananippavoli¨rddhanamaḷaguṇagaṇaniḷayaṁ . sraṣṭaṁ tāṁ vāgvī¨ryāvaṣṭaṁbhado ḷenisi nega¨rddaneḷeyoḷmudade vaśiṣṭapravaraṁ
viprōtkṛṣṭaṁ śrī vēdamū¨rtti mādhavadēvaṁ . Ā vibhugaṁ sādhvi śrīdēvigumanurāga māge puṭṭidanakhiḷō¨rbbīvaḷayaṁ baṇnise bhūdēvōttamaneni
pa peṁpiniṁ śivarājaṁ . surasiṁdhurakke dānaṁ haricaṁdanataruge sakaḷasatphaḷamesevaṁtire ba¨rṁmmaṇadaṁḍādhipanarasutanakkesadu niṁdanī
śivarājaṁ . śivadēvaṁ bhaktiyiṁdaṁ bhayadineṟagida¨rgganyasainyakke tāṁ bhairavadēvaṁ ga¨rbbhavāsasthitiyoḷu sukhadiṁdi¨rppa lōkōktiyiṁ kēśavadēvaṁ tī
bratējaṁ diśevidiśegaḷaṁ tīvikoṁḍoppe tō¨rppā ravidēvaṁ bhūmidēvānvaya vimaḷa sarōjātasaṁbhūtanītaṁ . maṁneya kaṁjakuṁjara madōddhatemaṁne
ya rājarāhu śau¨ryyōṁnatamaṁneyūdripati maṁneyapaṁnagavainatēya bhāśvaṁ narapāḷa maṁḍaḷika mauḷivighaṭṭita pādapīṭha bāppeṁnada
rā¨rmmanōmudadinī śivarājananī dharitriyoḷ . jagamellaṁ taṁnaṁ maṟevuge . kāvaṁ mīṟi tōruvaṁ yamamukhamaṁ bagegoṁḍu bēḍidudanā
vagamīvaṁ dayeyinadaṭiniṁdā¨rppiṁdaṁ . dha¨rmmada parōpakārada pe¨rmmeya nijarūpane saye manujākṛtiyiṁ ni¨rmmisidana¨rtthiyiṁde catu¨rmmukhanene nega
ḷdaneḷeyoḷī śivarājaṁ . muttageyoḷnijōṁnatiya kī¨rttiya puṇyada puṁjadaṁte digbhittiyaneyde ko¨rbbi baḷedabjabhavāṁḍamaneydalēḷge lōkōtta
ramāge ni¨rmmisidanutsavadiṁ ruciratrikūṭamopputtire dēvatāniḷayamaṁ śivarājacamūpana ¨rtthiyiṁ . surucirakūṭatrayadiṁ pariraṁ
jipa dēgulaṁgaḷaṁ ni¨rmmisidaṁ nirupamamahimaṁ vijayāpuradoḷu jagadēkapuradoḷī puravaradoḷu . © svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ .
śrī prithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmat pratāpacakrava
¨rtti jagadēkamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhiprava¨rddhamānamācaṁdrā ¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttaṁ kalyāṇapurada nelevīḍinoḷu sukha
saṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ gayuttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvitanuṁ mahāmātyapadavī virājitanuṁ samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmaṁtādhipa
ti mahāpradhānaṁ haḍapadadhiṣṭāyakaṁ maneve¨rggaḍe sēnādhipati daṁḍanāyakaṁ baṁma ṇayyaṁ biṁnapaṁ geyyaladaṁdibyacittadalu kēḷdavadhā
risi ta¨rddavāḍisāsirada baḷiya kaṁpaṇaṁ muttageya movattaṟa modala bāḍaṁ śrīmatsa¨rbba namaśya duttamadagrahāraṁ muttageya śrī
śivaliṁgadēva¨rgge Ā nāḍa baḷiya kaṁpaṇaṁ hebbāḷu haṁneraḍahoḷagaṇa nāgavāḍamaṁ sa¨rbba namasyaṁ māḍi . svasti śrīmaccāḷukya pratāpacakrava
¨rtti jagadēkamalladēvaru svakīyarājyābhyudayada 10 neya prabhava saṁvatsarada caitra bahuḷa 5 sōmavāradaṁdana viṣu
saṁkrāṁti byatīpātapa¨rbbanimittaṁ paramabhaktipū¨rbbakaṁ dayaṁ geydu kuḍalu samasta pradhānara śrī manmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ kumāraṁ bijjaladē
varasara saurasediṁ patthaḷesahitaṁ paḍedu barada śāsanaṁ . © . va . śrīmat śivarājadaṁḍanā yakaṁ taṁniṁ ni¨rmmitamāda Ī dha¨rmasthānamaṁ parama
naiṣṭhikasthānaṁ māḍi kuḍe paḍedā śrī lakuḷēśvaradēvara gurukuḷakramameṁteṁdaḍe . sūri janaṁgaḷoḷ nuḍiyinī jagadoḷ jaya
vādiyāge kaivārade vēdasāraracitābharaṇānviteyāgi vāṇi kāśmīrade kūḍi baṁdu vijayāpuradoḷ nelasalnegaḷda kāśmīramu
nīṁdranoḷnuḍige sōladarā¨rnnuḍidaṁdu tā¨rkkikar . Ā dibyamunige śiṣya¨rvvēdāṁta vida¨rssamasta śāstrā¨rttha kaḷābhēda viśēṣajña¨rparavādima
hāpraḷaya kālabhairavadēvar . Avara śiṣyaru . niratiśaya jñānāmṛtasaranidhiyoḷu parama tatvabhāvaneyaḷavaṭṭire taṁnoḷakhiḷayō
gīśvaradēvamunīṁdraresadaramaḷacaritrar . Avaragraśiṣyarī bhūbhavanajanakkabhimatā¨rttha siddhiyanīyalu śivane yatirūpamaṁ taḷedavatarisida
nenisida¨rvvarēśvaradēvar . viśvaṁbhare baṇnisaluvarēśvaradēva¨rgge śiṣyarādar śrī yōgīśvara dēva¨rpparamamunīśvarasaṁstutyacaritarapagataduritar .
Ene negaḷda paramanaiṣṭhikamunipara śiṣya¨rssamastalōkōttamarī vananidhiparivṛtadhātrīvinu ta¨rllakuḷīśvarabratīśvararesedar . sakaḷajñaṁ śivata
tvavēdi manumā¨rgaṁ taṁna cāritradiṁ sakaḷō¨rbbīvaḷayaṁ pavitrataramāyteṁbaṁnegaṁ mikka naiṣṭhikacūḍāmaṇi lākuḷāgama sudhāṁbhōrāśitā
rādhipaṁ lakuḷīśabratiyeṁdu baṇnipudiḷābhāgaṁ manōrāgadiṁ . Iṁtu negaḷda . śrīlaku ḷīśapada prakṣālanaṁ māḍi koṭṭanī sthānamanī bhūlō
kamaṟiye tāṁ kai mēlāgire dhāreyeṟedu sale śivarājaṁ . taṁnaya vṛttiya keyyaṁ paṁniṁ 12 mattaranadakka dēva¨rttiṟuva¨rppaṁnoṁdu 11 paṇa
maneṁdū¨rmmannise paḍedittanābaḷiya moge sahitaṁ . sāmānyōyaṁ dha¨rmmasētu ¨rnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sa¨rbbānētānbhāginaḥ pā¨rtthi
vēṁdrānbhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdra . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā śaṣṭi¨rvva¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyūṁ jāyatē kṛ
mī . © mattamoṁduttarōttaraṁ . śrīmabbijjaladēvanṛpāmātyaṁ daṁḍanāthacūḍā ratnaṁ śrīmaiḷāracamūpaṁ sāmajaripuvikramaṁ parā
kramabhīmaṁ . krūrārātikapāḷamaṁ ripukarabyagraykatībrāsiyaṁ vairibrātakarōḍi māleyumanugrāṭōpamaṁ bhīkarākāraṁ betta
le raudramū¨rttiyumanī daṁḍādhipaṁ vīramaiḷāraṁ tōruvanājiṟaṁgadoḷ mitrānīka mutkaṁpisal . raṇadoḷuṟadāṁtaraṁ vitaraṇadoḷu kai
yā�reṟaḍamōḍisi sale kaiguṇamaṁ tōṟuva raṇavitaraṇaśūraṁ daṁḍanāyakaṁ maiḷā� ta¨rddavāḍināḍaṁ duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapratipā
ḷanadiṁdāḷdu nāḍarasugeyyutti¨rddā baṇnigedaṟeyadhikāramaṁ tāṁ kuḍe paḍedā paramēśvaraṁ pe¨rggaḍe baṁmarasaṁ śrī śivaliṁgadēva¨rgge .
karaṇaṁgaḷanugrahadiṁ dhare pogaḷalu negaḷda mu¨rttageya baṇnigeyoḷe sthiramāgiroṁdu poṁnaṁ variṣaṁprati naḍeye koṭṭanāḷdana
numatadiṁ . © dō¨rbbaḷabhīmaṁ ripukuḷapa¨rbbatakuḷiśāyudhaṁ parākramadhananainū ¨rbbara saṁnāhaṁ sakaḷō¨rbbareyoḷ caṭṭiseṭṭi bīrara bīraṁ .
samaradhuraṁdharanātana kumaraṁ naḍegōṭemallanarihṛtsellaṁ samayasamuddharaṇaṁ vikrama tuṁga nāciseṭṭi vairigharaṭṭaṁ . kāṁtiya pe¨rṁmma
bolatidhai¨ryada śau¨ryyada gu¨rbbuvetta vikrāntada naṁniyuṁnatikeyaṁ naṟe tāḷdida nāciseṭṭi nairantaramāgiralke śivaliṁga
mahāmahimaṁge nāgavāḍaṁ tanagīva bīravaṇada¨rtthamanāvagamittana¨rtthiyiṁ . dharaṇī vallabharuṁ pradhānapuruṣa¨rddaṁḍādhipa¨rnnāḍanāḷva
rasa¨rppe¨rggaḍegaḷsamastakaraṇaṁgaḷnāḍugaḷmattamī puradādiprabhugaḷmahājanamumārāydaṁ dumī dha¨rmmamaṁ paripāḷippudu tamma dha¨rmma
midu tāṁ caṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ . © śrīmatu kēśavadēvara kaḷaśārōpaṇadalu śrīmadū roḍeya pramukhamaśēṣama
hājanaṁgaḷu biṭṭa keyi nālkeneya viṭṭapayyaṁgaḷa pannasinalu ḍōṇiyiṁ baḍagalu śivarā jana vṛttiya mattaru 4 Ā
pannasinalu gōpatighaḷisāsara magaṁ rēcaṇaghaḷisāsara kaiyalu śrīlakuḷēśvaradēvaru dhāregoṇḍu biṭṭa keyi mā
sīmeyiṁ teṁkalu śivarājaṁ biṭṭa haṁnimattariṁ baḍagalu mattaru 5 Antu mattaru 9 Ītiruvaṟuvaṇaṁ paṇa mā
gaḍiya nāgarasana kaiyyalu lakuḷīśvaradēvaru dhāregoṇḍu biṭṭa sa¨rvvanamaśyada tōṁṭa kōṭerājana tōṁṭadiṁ paḍuvalu gōviṁda
rasara heṁmadōṁṭadiṁ baḍagalu kamma 7 . ©
Digital edition of SII 15.32 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
